assignments.name: requirement_context
assignments.value: ={{`Event type: ${$json.event_type} Project: ${$json.project} Work item ID: ${$json.work_item_id} Title: ${$json.title} Description: ${$json.description} Acceptance criteria: ${$json.acceptance_criteria} Priority: ${$json.priority} Status: ${$json.status}`}}

parameters.text:
Analyze the following requirement and determine if it is ready for development.

Your role is to:
- clarify the requirement
- evaluate acceptance criteria quality
- detect ambiguities
- identify missing information
- assess risk

Return ONLY valid JSON with this exact structure:

{
  "wf01_requirement_analysis": {
    "requirement_summary": "",
    "business_value": "",
    "acceptance_criteria_quality": "clear | incomplete | missing",
    "ambiguities": [],
    "missing_information": [],
    "questions_for_po": [],
    "ready_for_development": true,
    "risk_level": "low | medium | high",
    "human_validation_required": true
  }
}

Requirement context:
{{$json.requirement_context}}

options.systemMessage:
You are a senior business analyst working in an AI workflow for developers. 

Analyze the following requirement and determine if it is ready for technical breakdown, development, testing, and CI/CD integration.

Return only valid JSON with this exact structure:

{
  "wf01_requirement_analysis": {
    "requirement_summary": "",
    "business_value": "",
    "acceptance_criteria_quality": "clear | incomplete | missing",
    "ambiguities": [],
    "missing_information": [],
    "questions_for_po": [],
    "ready_for_development": true,
    "risk_level": "low | medium | high",
    "human_validation_required": true
  }
}

Requirement context:
{{$json.requirement_context}}

REMINDER : You are a strict requirement analyst. Return only valid JSON. No markdown. No explanation outside JSON.

assignments.name: wf01_requirement_analysis
assignments.value: ={{ {   requirement_summary: "The requirement cannot be analyzed because mandatory input fields are missing.",   business_value: "",   acceptance_criteria_quality: $json.has_acceptance_criteria ? "incomplete" : "missing",   ambiguities: ["Missing mandatory input fields."],   missing_information: [     !$json.title ? "title" : null,     !$json.description ? "description" : null   ].filter(Boolean),   questions_for_po: [     "Please provide a clear title.",     "Please provide a detailed description.",     "Please provide acceptance criteria if available."   ],   ready_for_development: false,   risk_level: "high",   human_validation_required: true } }}
